Discover insights from a global survey of 9,000 consumers across nine markets and learn how pricing clarity, duties, and tax transparency shape conversion, trust, and cross-border growth. Fill out the form to gain access.

top_signals.title: West Texas Cowboys Are Cashing In on the AI Land Rush
top_signals.summary: Forty miles outside Abilene, in the highlands between Taylor and Nolan counties, 421 wind turbines have spun since 2006. Horse Hollow was the largest wind farm on earth when it went up…nearly 47,000 acres of cattle country and mesquite scrub, leased from ranch families who mostly kept running cattle underneath the blades. West Texas doing what West Texas does best…selling the wind nobody else wanted. Twenty years later, the same stretch of the state is selling something else nobody has enough of…land with power still attached…
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
